tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get current weather for a location.

tools.name: run_action
tools.description: Run a custom action on your backend service. Examples: turn on the lights, set temperature to 72, lock the front door.

action.description: The action to perform (e.g. turn_on, set_temperature, lock)

target.description: The target to act on (e.g. lights, thermostat, front_door)

value.description: Optional value for the action (e.g. 72 for temperature)
